stemHtml: Under EASA AIRCREW regulations, which categories of Medical Certificates exist?

options.a: Class 1, Class 2, and LAPL Medical Certificate.
options.b: Class 1 and Class 2 Medical Certificate only.
options.c: LAPL, ATPL, CPL, and IR Medical Certificate.
options.d: Class 1, Class 2, and Class 3 Medical Certificate.
